title: Reduce Group By Label Margin
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the Group By label to have tight spacing, so that the toolbar layout is compact and clean.
description: Change the margin class on the Group By label from `mr-5` to `mr-1` to reduce excessive spacing.
acceptance_criteria: Group By label uses mr-1 instead of mr-5
Spacing between Group By label and adjacent elements is compact
ux_changes: Reduced excessive margin on the Group By label for a more compact toolbar layout.
implementation_notes: Already fixed as part of the MBT-320 batch of fixes.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed this was already fixed in the MBT-320 work.
